name: ApyHub Explorer
description: Browse, search, and integrate ApyHub APIs directly from Voiden. Discover 200+ production-ready APIs across AI, data processing, file conversion, and more — with live documentation and one-click request scaffolding.
author: Voiden
readme: ApyHub Explorer brings the full ApyHub API catalog into Voiden. Browse featured APIs, search by keyword, view detailed documentation with endpoint routes, and scaffold requests without leaving your workspace. Categories include Artificial Intelligence, Data Extraction, Data Validation, File Conversion, File Security, Image Processing, Smart Generation, and more.

buttons.description: Opens the ApyHub Explorer panel to browse and search APIs

ui.description: Registers a sidebar panel for browsing the ApyHub API catalog

blocks.description: Provides a request block pre-configured for ApyHub API endpoints

features: Browse 200+ production-ready APIs from the ApyHub catalog
Search APIs by keyword with debounced live results
Category-based icons and color-coded badges matching the ApyHub website
Detailed API view with endpoint routes, methods, and sample responses
Paginated browsing with featured API highlights
One-click request scaffolding from API documentation
Dark-theme optimized card UI with thumbnails and descriptions
